item.title: Megabore Lathe Setup for Precision Machining
item.description: A Megabore lathe is carefully set up for high-precision machining, ensuring accurate alignment and reliable performance for large-scale repair work.

media:content.media:title: Megabore Lathe Setup for Precision Machining
media:content.media:description: A Megabore lathe is carefully set up for high-precision machining, ensuring accurate alignment and reliable performance for large-scale repair work.

item.title: Cracked Cylinder Weld Repair Process
item.description: See the complete process of repairing a cracked hydraulic cylinder through careful welding, machining, and finishing.

media:content.media:title: Cracked Cylinder Weld Repair Process
media:content.media:description: See the complete process of repairing a cracked hydraulic cylinder through careful welding, machining, and finishing.

item.title: Repairing a $3000 Hydraulic Cylinder
item.description: Expert repair work gives a high-value hydraulic cylinder a second life, restoring performance while reducing replacement costs.

media:content.media:title: Repairing a $3000 Hydraulic Cylinder
media:content.media:description: Expert repair work gives a high-value hydraulic cylinder a second life, restoring performance while reducing replacement costs.

item.title: A Simple Shop Upgrade That Saves Time
item.description: A practical workshop improvement helps simplify everyday tasks, increasing efficiency with a straightforward upgrade.

item.title: Repairing a Torn Cylinder Eye
item.description: A torn cylinder eye is rebuilt with precision repair techniques to restore strength, alignment, and dependable performance.

media:content.media:title: Repairing a Torn Cylinder Eye

item.title: Repairing a $3,000 Hydraulic Cylinder
item.description: A costly hydraulic cylinder is restored through precision machining and welding, avoiding the need for a full replacement.

media:content.media:description: A costly hydraulic cylinder is restored through precision machining and welding, avoiding the need for a full replacement.

item.title: Caterpillar D11 Equalizer Bar Rebuild
item.description: Follow the restoration of a Caterpillar D11 equalizer bar as worn sections are repaired and prepared for another demanding service life.

media:content.media:description: Follow the restoration of a Caterpillar D11 equalizer bar as worn sections are repaired and prepared for another demanding service life.

item.title: Replacing a Cracked Equalizer Bar End
item.description: A cracked equalizer bar end is replaced to restore structural integrity and keep heavy equipment operating safely under extreme loads.

media:content.media:description: A cracked equalizer bar end is replaced to restore structural integrity and keep heavy equipment operating safely under extreme loads.

item.title: Brake Assembly and Engine Tests
item.description: Brake components are assembled and the engine is tested, ensuring critical systems are functioning properly before the machine returns to service.

media:content.media:title: Brake Assembly and Engine Tests
media:content.media:description: Brake components are assembled and the engine is tested, ensuring critical systems are functioning properly before the machine returns to service.

item.title: What's With the Helicopter?
item.description: A surprise helicopter appearance sparks curiosity and adds an unexpected twist to an otherwise busy day in the workshop.

item.title: A Workshop Essential in Action
item.description: A practical look at a workshop essential and why it earns its place in the shop. Clean, precise engineering and useful workshop thinking from start to finish. What would your workshop not be without?

item.description: Purpose-built shop tools streamline machine setup, helping improve accuracy while reducing downtime on every project.

item.title: Caterpillar D11 Equalizer Bar Rebuild
item.description: A complete rebuild of a Caterpillar D11 equalizer bar restores one of the machine’s key structural components for reliable field performance.

item.title: Homemade Extractor Tested for Performance
item.description: A homemade extractor is put to the test, showing the machining and fabrication behind its build. A practical look at precision engineering and workshop problem-solving. How do you think it performs?

media:content.media:description: A homemade extractor is put to the test, showing the machining and fabrication behind its build. A practical look at precision engineering and workshop problem-solving. How do you think it performs?

item.title: Restoring a Big Excavator Arm and Bucket

item.title: Can a DIY Fume Extractor Work?
item.description: A practical look at a DIY fume extractor and whether it can do the job in a workshop setting. The focus is on the build, airflow, and real-world usefulness. How would you approach a project like this?

media:content.media:title: Can a DIY Fume Extractor Work?
media:content.media:description: A practical look at a DIY fume extractor and whether it can do the job in a workshop setting. The focus is on the build, airflow, and real-world usefulness. How would you approach a project like this?

item.title: Line Boring and Bore Welding Repair
item.description: Oversized bushings call for line boring and bore welding to restore a precise fit. A practical look at machining, repair, and careful workshop workmanship. What would you tackle first?

media:content.media:title: Line Boring and Bore Welding Repair
media:content.media:description: Oversized bushings call for line boring and bore welding to restore a precise fit. A practical look at machining, repair, and careful workshop workmanship. What would you tackle first?
